acceptance_criteria_covered: Valid inbound voice webhook creates voicemail artifact linked to resolved active thread context

Voicemail artifact success enqueues transcription with callback correlation metadata
Voicemail-only inbound events preserve escalation and inactivity reset behavior unless locked lifecycle rules require change
End-to-end inbound voice webhook journey creates voicemail artifact on active thread timeline with deterministic context linkage
State matrix validates no-thread fallback, unclaimed voicemail-only, and claimed orgUnit-configured routing behavior
